<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Jericho M. Capio — Virtual Assistant & QA Team Lead</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --ink: #1a1a18;
    --ink-soft: #5a5a55;
    --ink-faint: #9a9a93;
    --paper: #f7f6f2;
    --paper-warm: #eeecea;
    --accent: #2d5a3d;
    --accent-light: #e8f0eb;
    --rule: #dddbd5;
    --serif: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif;
    --sans: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
  }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: var(--sans);
    background: var(--paper);
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    font-weight: 300;
  }

  /* Nav */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    background: var(--paper);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    padding: 0 2rem;
    height: 56px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .nav-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 17px;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    color: var(--ink);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 2rem;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    text-decoration: none;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

  /* Main layout */
  main {
    max-width: 760px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 56px 2rem 0;
  }

  section {
    padding: 5rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  }

  section:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  /* Hero */
  #hero {
    padding-top: 6rem;
    padding-bottom: 5rem;
  }

  .hero-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--accent);
    background: var(--accent-light);
    padding: 4px 12px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .hero-name {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 6vw, 3.8rem);
    line-height: 1.1;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 3vw, 1.5rem);
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  .hero-summary {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    max-width: 580px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  }

  .hero-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
  }

  .hero-cta:hover { background: #1f4029; transform: translateY(-1px); }

  /* Section labels */
  .section-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ink-faint);
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .section-label::after {
    content: '';
    flex: 1;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--rule);
  }

  /* Skills */
  .skills-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--rule);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }

  .skill-item {
    background: var(--paper);
    padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .skill-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* Experience */
  .exp-entry {
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  .exp-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: baseline;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  }

  .exp-role {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--ink);
  }

  .exp-date {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--ink-faint);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .exp-company {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--accent);
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }

  .exp-bullets {
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.65rem;
  }

  .exp-bullets li {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    line-height: 1.7;
    padding-left: 1.2rem;
    position: relative;
  }

  .exp-bullets li::before {
    content: '—';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: var(--rule);
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  .highlight {
    color: var(--ink);
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  /* Proof strip */
  .proof-strip {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--rule);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-radius: 4px;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin: 2.5rem 0;
  }

  .proof-card {
    background: var(--paper);
    padding: 1.25rem 1rem;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .proof-number {
    font-family: var(--serif);
    font-size: 2rem;
    color: var(--accent);
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .proof-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--ink-faint);
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  /* Contact */
  .contact-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
  }

  .contact-item {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 4px;
  }

  .contact-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ink-faint);
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .contact-value {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--ink-soft);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .contact-value:hover { color: var(--accent); }

  .availability-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 7px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--accent);
    background: var(--accent-light);
    padding: 8px 16px;
    border-radius: 2px;
    margin-top: 2rem;
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  .badge-dot {
    width: 7px;
    height: 7px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--accent);
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
    50% { opacity: 0.4; }
  }

  /* Footer */
  footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 3rem 2rem;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--ink-faint);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  /* Fade-in animation */
  .fade-in {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(16px);
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease forwards;
  }

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .fade-in:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
  .fade-in:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
  .fade-in:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
  .fade-in:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }


  /* Hero layout with photo */
  .hero-layout {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 3rem;
  }

  .hero-content {
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .hero-photo-wrap {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: 200px;
  }

  .hero-photo-wrap img {
    width: 200px;
    height: auto;
    border-radius: 0;
    display: block;
    mix-blend-mode: multiply;
  }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .hero-layout {
      flex-direction: column-reverse;
      gap: 1.5rem;
    }
    .hero-photo-wrap {
      width: 140px;
    }
    .hero-photo-wrap img {
      width: 140px;
      height: auto;
    }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    nav { padding: 0 1rem; }
    .nav-links { gap: 1.2rem; }
    main { padding: 56px 1.25rem 0; }
    #hero { padding-top: 4rem; }
    .exp-header { flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a href="#hero" class="nav-name">Jericho Capio</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<main>

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section id="hero">
    <div class="hero-layout">
      <div class="hero-content">
        <div class="fade-in">
          <span class="hero-tag">Open to opportunities</span>
        </div>
        <div class="fade-in">
          <h1 class="hero-name">Jericho M. Capio</h1>
          <p class="hero-title">Virtual Assistant &amp; QA Team Lead</p>
        </div>
        <div class="fade-in">
          <p class="hero-summary">
            Five years of remote work experience — keeping operations organized, leading teams, and delivering reliable results across time zones. I bring a sharp eye for detail, strong communication, and the discipline to work independently without missing a beat.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div class="fade-in">
          <a href="#contact" class="hero-cta">Get in touch →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-photo-wrap fade-in">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Jericho M. Capio" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- PROOF STRIP -->
  <div class="proof-strip">
    <div class="proof-card">
      <div class="proof-number">25</div>
      <div class="proof-label">Team members managed</div>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-card">
      <div class="proof-number">95%+</div>
      <div class="proof-label">Task &amp; deliverable completion</div>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-card">
      <div class="proof-number">8,000</div>
      <div class="proof-label">Records managed monthly</div>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-card">
      <div class="proof-number">50</div>
      <div class="proof-label">Team members onboarded</div>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-card">
      <div class="proof-number">5+</div>
      <div class="proof-label">Years of remote work</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ABOUT -->
  <section id="about">
    <p class="section-label">About</p>
    <p style="font-size: 15px; color: var(--ink-soft); line-height: 1.85; max-width: 620px; margin-bottom: 1.25rem;">
      I'm a remote professional based in the Philippines with five years of experience supporting teams, managing operations, and delivering consistent results across multiple time zones. I've led a 25-person team, stepped up as acting Team Lead for five months with zero disruption, and built processes that are still in use today.
    </p>
    <p style="font-size: 15px; color: var(--ink-soft); line-height: 1.85; max-width: 620px;">
      Whether the role calls for inbox management, team coordination, quality assurance, data entry, research, or keeping a busy professional's day running smoothly — I adapt quickly, communicate clearly, and treat every task with the same attention it deserves.
    </p>
  </section>

  <!-- SKILLS -->
  <section id="skills">
    <p class="section-label">Key skills</p>
    <div class="skills-grid">
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Virtual assistance &amp; admin support</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Calendar &amp; inbox management</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Quality assurance &amp; auditing</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Remote team leadership</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Data entry &amp; record management</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Process documentation &amp; SOPs</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Google Workspace &amp; Microsoft Office</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>CRM tools &amp; data management</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Research &amp; reporting</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Cross-timezone coordination</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>Slack, Teams, Trello, Zoom</div>
      <div class="skill-item"><span class="skill-dot"></span>VoIP &amp; client communication</div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- EXPERIENCE -->
  <section id="experience">
    <p class="section-label">Experience</p>

    <div class="exp-entry">
      <div class="exp-header">
        <span class="exp-role">Quality Assurance Team Lead</span>
        <span class="exp-date">Jun 2024 – Present</span>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-company">Advice Brands</div>
      <ul class="exp-bullets">
        <li>Coordinated day-to-day operations for a <span class="highlight">25-person team across 3 simultaneous campaigns and 3 time zones</span> — keeping schedules, coverage, and deliverables consistently on track.</li>
        <li><span class="highlight">Stepped up as acting Team Lead for 5 months</span> during a leadership gap, maintaining a 95%+ task completion rate with zero disruption to output.</li>
        <li>Monitored team performance, identified underperforming members, and delivered targeted coaching — <span class="highlight">bringing all 5 affected team members back to 90%+ compliance</span> within a single review cycle.</li>
        <li>Reviewed and documented <span class="highlight">1,200–2,000 work outputs per month</span>, flagging issues, escalating where needed, and following up directly with team members.</li>
        <li>Proactively surfaced recurring workflow gaps in weekly reports, enabling leadership to reallocate resources — <span class="highlight">sustaining client deliverable rates at 90–95%</span> throughout.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="exp-entry">
      <div class="exp-header">
        <span class="exp-role">Senior Quality Assurance Specialist</span>
        <span class="exp-date">Oct 2023 – Jun 2024</span>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-company">Advice Brands</div>
      <ul class="exp-bullets">
        <li>Onboarded and trained <span class="highlight">50 team members</span> as the team scaled from 10, getting each person to independent performance within 2 weeks to 1 month.</li>
        <li>Reviewed approximately <span class="highlight">1,280 work outputs per week</span>, identified a recurring accuracy issue, and introduced a standardized protocol that resolved it across the entire team.</li>
        <li>Conducted systematic audits and evaluations, maintaining thorough documentation that supported compliance and data integrity across all client accounts.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="exp-entry">
      <div class="exp-header">
        <span class="exp-role">Quality Assurance Specialist</span>
        <span class="exp-date">May 2021 – Oct 2023</span>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-company">Advice Brands</div>
      <ul class="exp-bullets">
        <li>Identified a recurring data error, escalated to management, and proposed a solution — a recommendation that <span class="highlight">directly led to the creation of a verification process</span> still used in operations today.</li>
        <li>Maintained and updated <span class="highlight">8,000 records per month</span> relied upon by multiple departments including delivery, marketing, and management.</li>
        <li>Caught and resolved approximately <span class="highlight">4 data and routing errors per week</span>, including critical failures that would have impacted output quality if left unaddressed.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CONTACT -->
  <section id="contact">
    <p class="section-label">Contact</p>
    <p style="font-size: 15px; color: var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Based in the Philippines. Available full-time for remote roles across any time zone.</p>

    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div class="contact-item">
        <span class="contact-label">Email</span>
        <a href="mailto:jerichocaps7@gmail.com" class="contact-value">jerichocaps7@gmail.com</a>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item">
        <span class="contact-label">Phone / WhatsApp</span>
        <span class="contact-value">+63 955 913 3712</span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item">
        <span class="contact-label">LinkedIn</span>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jericho-c-744352210/" target="_blank" class="contact-value">linkedin.com/in/jericho-c</a>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-item">
        <span class="contact-label">Time zone availability</span>
        <span class="contact-value">EST · PST · GMT · AEST</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="availability-badge">
      <span class="badge-dot"></span>
      Available now — open to full-time remote roles
    </div>
  </section>

</main>

<footer>
  © 2026 Jericho M. Capio · Philippines
</footer>

</body>
</html>
